title: Windows WebGPU service integration
description: Repo-owned lane for the custom Windows WebGPU service needed after WebGPU/Dawn compilation succeeds.
notes: Keep service/process integration here, not in generic Windows build-fix patches.
Use patches/windows for Windows-only WebKit source changes.
Use patches/common only if the WebGPU service requires cross-platform WebKit interfaces.
Acceptance requires MiniBrowser runtime validation where navigator.gpu.requestAdapter() succeeds, not just ENABLE_WEBGPU=ON in CMake.
